message:
feat(core): add environment detection module

Add comprehensive environment detection for runtime adaptation:

crates/wa-core/src/environment.rs (12KB):
- Detect terminal capabilities and features
- Identify running environment (WezTerm, tmux, SSH, etc.)
- Provide environment-aware configuration defaults
- Export environment information for diagnostics

crates/wa-core/src/lib.rs:
- Export new environment module

This enables the runtime to adapt behavior based on the detected
terminal environment for optimal compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
